ats_utilities.option.strategy.parser_strategy_registry module¶

Module

parser_strategy_registry.py

Info

Defines class ParserStrategyRegistry with attribute(s) and method(s). Encapsulates core parser strategy components for simplification of ParserStrategyBundle creation.

class ats_utilities.option.strategy.parser_strategy_registry.ParserStrategyRegistry[source]¶

Bases: IRegistry[ParserStrategyBundle, ParserStrategyParams]

Encapsulates core parser components for simplification of ParserStrategyBundle creation.

It defines:

methods:
create_bundle - Creates a ParserStrategyBundle.
create_parser_strategy_bundle_from_dict - Creates a ParserStrategyBundle from dict parameters.
_abc_impl = <_abc._abc_data object>¶
classmethod create_bundle(params: ParserStrategyParams) → ParserStrategyBundle[source]¶

Creates a ParserStrategyBundle instance.

Parameters:

params (ParserStrategyParams) – Registry-specific orchestration parameters.

Returns:

ParserStrategyBundle instance.

Return type:

<ParserStrategyBundle>

Exceptions:
ATSValueError: Parameters must be provided.
ATSValueError: Context bundle must be provided.
ATSTypeError: Parameters must be a mapping.
ATSTypeError: Context bundle must be a ContextBundle instance.
classmethod create_parser_strategy_bundle_from_dict(parameters: ~collections.abc.Mapping[str, str], context_bundle: ~ats_utilities.context.context_bundle.ContextBundle, parser_class: type[~ats_utilities.option.parser.iarg_parser.IArgParser] = <class 'ats_utilities.option.parser.engine.ArgParser'>) → ParserStrategyBundle[source]¶

Creates a ParserStrategyBundle from parameters in mapping format.

Parameters:

  • parameters (<Mapping[str, str]>) – Metadata parameters in mapping format.

  • context_bundle (<ContextBundle>) – Context bundle for option bundle.

  • parser_class (<type[IArgParser]>) – Parser class to use.

Returns:

ParserStrategyBundle instance.

Return type:

<ParserStrategyBundle>

Exceptions:

None.
